item.name: Kongamato Whistle
item.description: A small, conch-like whistle used to summon a Gnath-trained kongamato.

mount.name: Kongamato
mount.action: Summon forth your kongamato, raised with care by the Vath stickpeddler.
mount.description: After hatching from an egg laid near the riverbanks, the kongamato larva spends its early life as a water-dwelling insect. Its maturity is signified by metamorphosis, during which its wings sprout forth and it takes to the skies.
mount.tooltip:
Kongamato can be fickle─yes,
very fickle─but they always
return home to us.
- Vath Kintamer
